name: 08 · Failure Handling
description: Step 8 of the learning path. AutomatedStep has two output ports: the default success port on the right and the red `error` port on the bottom. A Python `raise` (or non-zero exit) routes the token to the error port once retries are exhausted. Wire that port to a Failure node + End to surface a structured error envelope; leave it dangling and the step dead-ends silently on failure.
